evals.description: Agent should authenticate using bagdock login
evals.input: Log me into Bagdock
evals.expected_behavior: Opens browser for OAuth device flow, waits for approval

evals.description: Agent should create an API key with proper flags
evals.input: Create a live API key named 'CI Deploy' for my GitHub Actions
evals.expected_behavior: Creates key, captures raw key from JSON output for use in CI

evals.description: Agent should create a test environment key
evals.input: I need a test API key with read-only access to units and contacts
expected_commands: bagdock keys create --name "Test Read-Only" --environment test --category restricted --scopes units:read contacts:read --json
evals.expected_behavior: Creates restricted test key with specified scopes

evals.description: Agent should list API keys
evals.input: Show me all my live API keys
evals.expected_behavior: Lists all active live-environment API keys

evals.description: Agent should revoke an API key with confirmation
evals.input: Delete the API key ak_abc123, it was compromised
evals.expected_behavior: Revokes the specified key immediately

evals.description: Agent should deploy to staging
evals.input: Deploy my adapter to staging
evals.expected_behavior: Builds and deploys to staging environment

evals.description: Agent should deploy to production with confirmation
evals.input: Push this to production
evals.expected_behavior: Deploys to production, skipping prompt since agent is non-TTY

evals.description: Agent should deploy a preview
evals.input: Create a preview deployment for this PR
evals.expected_behavior: Creates ephemeral preview URL, outputs JSON with URL

evals.description: Agent should set an environment variable
evals.input: Set the VENDOR_API_KEY to sk_live_abc123 for my adapter
evals.expected_behavior: Sets the variable, notes it takes effect on next deploy

evals.description: Agent should scaffold a new edge adapter project
evals.input: Create a new access control adapter called smart-entry
expected_commands: bagdock init --type edge --kind adapter --category access_control --slug smart-entry --name "Smart Entry"
evals.expected_behavior: Scaffolds project with bagdock.json and starter files

evals.description: Agent should set up a CI/CD pipeline using API key
evals.input: Set up GitHub Actions to deploy my adapter on push to main
evals.expected_behavior: Creates workflow that uses BAGDOCK_API_KEY secret, runs bagdock deploy --production --yes --json

evals.description: Agent should check authentication status
evals.input: Am I logged into Bagdock?
evals.expected_behavior: Shows current user email and operator ID

evals.description: Agent should submit app for marketplace review
evals.input: Submit my public adapter for review so I can deploy to production
evals.expected_behavior: Transitions review_status from draft to submitted

evals.description: Agent should use --json flag in non-interactive mode
evals.input: Get all my API keys in a script-friendly format
evals.expected_behavior: Outputs JSON array of keys to stdout

evals.description: Agent should run diagnostics to verify environment
evals.input: Check if my Bagdock setup is working correctly
evals.expected_behavior: Runs version, auth, config, and AI agent checks

evals.description: Agent should run diagnostics in JSON mode
evals.input: Get diagnostics as JSON to check my environment
evals.expected_behavior: Returns { ok: boolean, checks: [...] } JSON to stdout

evals.description: Agent should switch between operator profiles
evals.input: Switch to my production profile
evals.expected_behavior: Switches active profile to 'production'

evals.description: Agent should list available profiles
evals.input: What Bagdock profiles do I have?
evals.expected_behavior: Lists all stored profiles with email and active status

evals.description: Agent should use --profile flag for one-off commands
evals.input: Deploy to production using my prod profile
evals.expected_behavior: Uses prod profile credentials for this deployment only

evals.description: Agent should tail live logs for debugging
evals.input: Show me the live logs for my smart-entry adapter
evals.expected_behavior: Streams live execution logs for the specified app

evals.description: Agent should list deployed applications
evals.input: What apps do I have deployed?
evals.expected_behavior: Lists all deployed apps with slugs, types, and status
